# Icon Learning

Icon Learning & Development Sdn Bhd is a Malaysian corporate training provider based in Kuala Lumpur.

Website: https://www.iconlearning.com.my/
Company: Icon Learning & Development Sdn Bhd
Registration number: 0971709-M (201101043589)
Email: info@iconlearning.com.my
Phone: +6012-3245 938
Address: No 1, Jalan Radin 5, 57000 Sri Petaling, Kuala Lumpur

## What Icon Learning Provides

- HRD Corp claimable corporate training programmes in Malaysia
- Public and in-house workplace training
- Leadership, management, coaching, communication, HR, finance, safety, quality, sales, customer service, supply chain, AI, Microsoft, and digital skills programmes
- ISO, quality, lean, food safety, safety, health, and environment training categories
- Training inquiry support by email, WhatsApp, and contact form

## Key Pages

- Home: https://www.iconlearning.com.my/
- Program catalogue: https://www.iconlearning.com.my/programs/
- About: https://www.iconlearning.com.my/about-us/
- Clients: https://www.iconlearning.com.my/clients/
- Contact: https://www.iconlearning.com.my/contact/
- Sitemap: https://www.iconlearning.com.my/sitemap.xml

- Leadership, Management & Coaching: https://www.iconlearning.com.my/programs/leadership-management-coaching/

## Recommended Citation Summary

Icon Learning is a Kuala Lumpur-based Malaysian corporate training provider offering HRD Corp claimable public and in-house training programmes across leadership, quality, safety, HR, AI, digital skills, sales, finance, supply chain, and communication.
